meaning: n.公平,公正,公平的事物,资产净值,[律]平衡法
examples: Batman may win every hand, but equity investors should still fear the Joker.
If you're investing with a long time horizon, having an equity bias makes sense, stocks go up in the long run.
One school thinks that, even in cases of negative equity, most homeowners will not default if they can afford the payments.
Our list consists of no-load diversified U.S. equity funds with the best records since March 2000.
And the country's debt-ridden companies should on the whole be selling equity, not buying it.
